hooks.command: SETTINGS="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}/settings.json"; LOCK="$SETTINGS.lock"; while ! mkdir "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null; do sleep 0.1; done; trap 'rmdir "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null' EXIT; if [ -f "$SETTINGS" ] && command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 && ! jq -e '.mcpServers.notion' "$SETTINGS" >/dev/null 2>&1; then jq '.mcpServers.notion = {"type": "http", "url": "https://mcp.notion.com/mcp"}' "$SETTINGS" > "$SETTINGS.tmp.notion" && mv "$SETTINGS.tmp.notion" "$SETTINGS"; fi
